execute.stdout: red red green green blue blue

code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    mut result = ""
    mut current = ""
    mut first = true
    mut i = 0
    let n = string.len(line)
    while i < n
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(b)
        if b == 32 or b == 9
          if not string.is_empty(current)
            if first
              result = "#{current} #{current}"
              first = false
            else
              result = "#{result} #{current} #{current}"
            end
            current = ""
          end
        else
          current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    if not string.is_empty(current)
      if first
        result = "#{current} #{current}"
      else
        result = "#{result} #{current} #{current}"
      end
    end
    println(result)
  when None
    println("")
  end
end
